name: Karora
description: Karora Resources Inc. is a Canada-based multi-asset mineral resource company focused on the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of precious metal properties. The company is a growing gold producer with primary operations located in Western Australia, including the Beta Hunt Underground Mine, the Higginsville Gold Operations, and the Lakewood Mill. Karora Resources is committed to sustainable mining practices and aims to become a high-quality mid-tier gold producer. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, and is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol KRR.
